summary: V2 upgrade plan for the Document Management System. Covers 6 major features: (1) Dynamic Form Builder with custom fields stored in DocumentRequirement, (2) Dedicated Teacher APIs under /api/teacher/documents, (3) Dedicated Teacher UI at /teacher/documents, (4) Bulk ZIP Download with secure temp links and audit logging, (5) Updated DocumentSubmission schema for JSON form responses, (6) Download audit trail. Includes updated Mongoose schemas, API table, authorization matrix, flow diagrams, and implementation phases.
